targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    REPLACE(LTRIM(RTRIM([Production Date [S]]])), '-', '/') AS [Production Date],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Production Time]))                    AS [Production Time],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))                              AS [Part No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))                            AS [Part Name],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))                              AS [Mold No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.]))                            AS [Cavity No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))                               AS [M/C No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))                         AS [Lot Material],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.]))                       AS [Sample Part No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))                        AS [Condition STD],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))                                AS [OI No.],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC]))                                  AS [ISC],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([STD Value]))                            AS [STD],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Upper Limit]))                          AS [UL],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Lower Limit]))                          AS [LL],
    ISNULL(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), [XBar]), '')            AS [XBar],
    ISNULL(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), [XBar]), '')            AS [Data],
    CASE
        WHEN [XBar] > TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Upper Limit])) AS FLOAT)
            THEN 'HIGH NG'
        WHEN [XBar] < TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Lower Limit])) AS FLOAT)
            THEN 'LOW NG'
        ELSE 'LOT NG'
    END                                                  AS [Status],
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Source Path]))                          AS [Source Path]
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Type]))       = 'Injection'
    AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]])) = 'X'
    AND ISNULL([Upper Limit], '') NOT LIKE '[0-9]%E[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]%'
    AND ISNULL([Lower Limit], '') NOT LIKE '[0-9]%E[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]%'
ORDER BY [Production Date [S]]] DESC, [ISC] ASC
